documentation
documentationblogcontact
UniversalStakingSymbiotic is the universal staking framework enabling decentralized networks to bootstrap powerful, fully sovereign ecosystems.Restake
OpenMaximally capital-efficient sourcing of node operators and economic security through an extendable collateral base and scalable architecture.
ModularSymbiotic is a minimal coordination layer that can plug into existing or novel network architectures. Symbiotic to all market actors.
PermissionlessImmutable core contracts give Symbiotic builders choice and control over shared security agreements. No unnecessary governance, slashing committee, or permissioning.
FlexibleNetworks using Symbiotic have fully customizable punishment and reward mechanisms. Adaptable restaking logic allows networks to seamlessly adjust to evolving requirements.
